When to use:

Deliver Java and Spring Boot services to containers and cloud platforms with health checks, configuration, observability hooks, and CI/CD. Use when dockerizing JVM apps, configuring liveness/readiness probes, tuning container memory, setting up deployment pipelines, or preparing Java services for Kubernetes and cloud runtimes.
